title: offer_spec envelope
description: Envelope for a normalized job offer emitted by offer-scout. Pins kind via const and reuses the shared agent_result_v1 base. Content fields for the offer body are deferred to Phase 3; only the hash anchor is declared here.

offer_spec_hash.description: Canonical SHA-256 over the frozen offer-spec content subset (computed by Plan 04's hash_artifact.py).
